raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_1 is reachable by the left arm from the tabletop edge. The left side of box_1 has enough clearance from the table boundary to allow gentle lateral bracing without colliding with the table surface or box_2 (which is attached on box_1's right side).",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is laterally braced by the left end-effector, reducing the risk of box_2 inducing slip/rotation during the main grasp."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_1 is stabilized by the left arm. The right arm has unobstructed access to the outer (left) face region of box_1 or a pinchable edge that is not blocked by box_2 (attached on the right). The cup (in front of box_2) does not interfere with the right arm’s approach trajectory to box_1.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is securely held under right-arm control and is no longer resting on the table (picked up)."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: box_1 is reachable by the left arm from the tabletop edge. The left side of box_1 has enough clearance from the table boundary to allow gentle lateral bracing without colliding with the table surface or box_2 (which is attached on box_1's right side).
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is laterally braced by the left end-effector, reducing the risk of box_2 inducing slip/rotation during the main grasp.

parsed_json.Precondition: box_1 is stabilized by the left arm. The right arm has unobstructed access to the outer (left) face region of box_1 or a pinchable edge that is not blocked by box_2 (attached on the right). The cup (in front of box_2) does not interfere with the right arm’s approach trajectory to box_1.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is securely held under right-arm control and is no longer resting on the table (picked up).
